subjects.description: translucent spherical glass ornament holding a miniature Zen garden
subjects.appearance_details: clear glass sphere with subtle refraction, suspended in soft light, enclosing raked sand, tiny stones, and miniature plants
subjects.relationship: main object containing the tiny animated world
subjects.location: center frame in close-up against a softly diffused background
subjects.relative_size: large in frame, with the inner world appearing tiny and delicate
subjects.orientation: front-facing sphere with the garden visible through curved glass
subjects.pose: hanging nearly still with a faint natural sway
subjects.action: reveals the miniature garden through shifting reflections and warm highlights
subjects.state_changes: glass reflections drift slightly; warm highlights slide across the curve; inner sand patterns become clearer
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: smooth transparent glass with glossy refraction and tiny dust-free clarity

subjects.description: tiny animated dwarf raking sand inside the ornament
subjects.appearance_details: grain-of-sand scale figure with small robe, tiny rake, careful movements, and precise body gestures
subjects.relationship: miniature caretaker of the Zen garden inside the sphere
subjects.location: inside the glass sphere at the center of the raked sand
subjects.relative_size: extremely small compared with the glass ornament and garden stones
subjects.orientation: facing across the sand bed while working around stones
subjects.pose: slightly bent forward with both hands guiding a miniature rake
subjects.action: rakes intricate curved patterns through the sand with patient precision
subjects.state_changes: sand grooves form behind the rake; dwarf steps carefully between stones; patterns grow more elaborate over time
subjects.clothing: simple earth-toned miniature robe and tiny work shoes
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: tiny natural skin texture, mostly obscured by scale and warm light
subjects.facial_features: minute face with concentrated eyes and a calm mouth

background_setting: Soft diffused studio-like space behind the suspended ornament, with warm bokeh and no visible room detail distracting from the miniature world.

lighting.conditions: Gentle warm backlight and soft frontal fill, creating glass refraction, glowing edges, and delicate highlights on sand and stones.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Gentle warm backlight and soft frontal fill, creating glass refraction, glowing edges, and delicate highlights on sand and stones.

aesthetics.composition: Magical macro realism, serene miniature craftsmanship, translucent glass, fine sand texture, and quiet enchanted movement.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Magical macro realism, serene miniature craftsmanship, translucent glass, fine sand texture, and quiet enchanted movement.

cinematography.camera_motion: Extreme close-up macro shot with shallow depth of field, slow push-in, and careful focus through curved glass onto the tiny dwarf.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Serene magical realism with handcrafted detail and warm contemplative tone.
context: A suspended glass ornament contains a living miniature Zen garden where a tiny dwarf patiently shapes sand patterns.

actions.description: The camera settles on the glowing glass sphere and reveals the miniature Zen garden inside.
The tiny dwarf rakes curved lines into the sand, stepping carefully around stones and plants.
The glass sphere sways faintly as the completed sand pattern catches warm light.

segments.description: Introduce the suspended translucent ornament and the tiny garden visible through the glass.
segments.key_changes: sphere comes into focus; inner stones and sand appear; warm glow increases

segments.description: Focus through the glass on the dwarf raking intricate sand designs.
segments.key_changes: rake lines deepen; dwarf crosses the sand; miniature plants shift slightly in perspective
segments.camera: locked macro focus with slight focus breathing

segments.description: Hold on the finished pattern inside the glowing ornament.
segments.key_changes: sphere sways subtly; reflections slide; sand design reads clearly

temporal_caption: A translucent glass sphere reveals a tiny dwarf calmly raking a miniature Zen garden inside.
audio_description: Soft room tone, faint glass chime, delicate sand scraping, tiny footfalls, and warm quiet ambience.
